instructions: This directory contains the Next.js dashboard, API routes, and state serialization for orchestrator sessions. Prioritize correctness at request boundaries, streaming cleanup, and shared payload shape changes.

rules.rule: Treat route params, query strings, request bodies, session IDs, filesystem paths, and command-like inputs as untrusted. Validate and normalize them before using them in filesystem, plugin, process, or network calls.
Server-Sent Events, polling loops, timers, event subscriptions, and long-lived connections must stop or unsubscribe on disconnect and error paths to avoid leaks and duplicate updates.
When changing API payloads, session/event shapes, or serialization logic, update server routes, client consumers, and serialization tests together.
